roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: deploys and verifies the reseller Edge worker before replacing Core during automatic updates
prevents ZIP updates from leaving reseller bots on an older Edge runtime
verifies the active Edge version through the service binding after Cloudflare deployment
keeps the active subscription ownership import fix from 3.2.12
adds an import runtime version marker for diagnostics

deployment.migration_tag: v3.1.9-live-usage (unchanged; no new Durable Object migration)
deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported when cf_account_id, cf_api_token and cf_worker_name are already saved and the token can update Workers scripts
deployment.activation: deploy core, edge and processor; the existing LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR binding and alarm state are reused
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active
